upgradeRequiredForLength: Upgrade is required for this story length.
generationTemporarilyUnavailable: We couldn't start a new story right now. Please try again.
generationRateLimited: StoryTime needs a short pause before creating another story. Please wait a moment, then try again.
approvalTemporarilyUnavailable: We couldn't unlock the full narration just yet. Try approving again.
webCryptoUnavailable: WebCrypto is unavailable in this browser.
webauthnRequiredForVerification: WebAuthn is required for parent verification on this device.
webauthnPublicKeyUnavailable: Browser does not expose a registrable WebAuthn public key.
unlockBeforeUpgrade: Verify parent identity before continuing to secure checkout.
upgradeCheckoutCompleted: Premium unlocked. Longer bedtime stories are ready.
unexpectedUpgradeTier: Upgrade confirmation did not return the expected entitlement tier.
unableToParseStoryArtifacts: Unable to parse story artifacts from local storage.
unableToParseProfile: Unable to parse profile from local storage.
unableToParseParentCredential: Unable to parse parent credential from local storage.
parentCredentialRegistrationFailedTempla: Parent credential registration failed with status {status}
loadingParentSettingsFailedTemplate: Loading parent settings failed with status {status}
updatingParentSettingsFailedTemplate: Updating parent settings failed with status {status}

ui.oneShotOptionalDetailsDescription: Keep it simple or add a few custom touches. StoryTime will fill in anything you leave blank.
ui.oneShotDetailsCollapsedHint: Optional details stay hidden until you ask for them.
ui.generatingStoryStatusTemplate: Creating a fresh bedtime story for {childName}…
ui.continuationGeneratedTemplate: {title} is ready and now leads this series.
ui.parentVerificationReadyHint: Use the same browser profile that created your parent passkey. StoryTime will unlock the rest of this card as soon as verification finishes.
ui.parentVerificationUnsupportedLocalHostTe: Passkeys only work in the localhost version of StoryTime on this device.
ui.parentVerificationUnsupportedHostTemplat: Passkeys aren't available from {host}. Open the localhost version of StoryTime to continue.
ui.parentVerificationRetryTemplate: We couldn't finish parent verification. Reopen the localhost version of StoryTime and try again.
ui.parentVerificationRetryCurrentTab: We couldn't finish parent verification. Keep StoryTime open in this tab and try the passkey prompt again.
ui.parentVerificationFocusRetry: Keep StoryTime in the foreground while the passkey prompt appears, then try again.
ui.parentVerificationProgress: Waiting for your passkey confirmation on this device.
ui.parentControlsUnlocked: Parent controls are unlocked on this device.
ui.parentControlsIntro: Unlock once, then manage bedtime browsing and future preferences in one calm place.
ui.parentControlsLockedSummary: Verify parent identity once to edit the settings below.
ui.notificationsScopeHint: Saves a bedtime reminder preference only. Push delivery is not enabled in this build.
ui.analyticsScopeHint: Stores consent for future diagnostics only. No external analytics provider is enabled by default.
ui.upgradeVerificationProgress: Verifying parent in this browser before opening checkout.
ui.upgradeFlowHint: Verify parent identity in this browser, then confirm the upgrade to unlock longer stories immediately.
ui.recentShelfDescription: Newest bedtime stories stay here so you can keep going right away.
ui.verifyParentToApprove: Verify parent identity before approving full narration.
ui.favoritesShelfDescription: Favorites stay condensed for quick replays, approvals, and calm browsing.
ui.noFavoritesYet: Star your favorites to find them here!
ui.errorFriendly: Unable to connect — stories you've already generated are still available below.
ui.librarySyncTitle: Saved stories are taking a moment to load.
ui.librarySyncBody: You can still start a new story. Try again to refresh Recent and Favorites.
ui.seriesSyncHint: Saved series options will return once Recent and Favorites reconnect.
ui.verifyToChange: Verify parent identity to change this setting
